news.headline: S&P 500 loses $2.4 trln in market value, biggest one-day loss since March 16th, 2020.
Trump: I like interest rates going down.
OrthoCare Georgia opens in Atlanta, offering personalized orthopedic care by Dr. Ghattas. Prioritizing direct surgeon access and customized treatment.
news.summary: In Riverdale, Georgia, a new orthopedic practice called OrthoCare Georgia has been established by Dr. Timothy Ghattas, a well-known surgeon in Atlanta. Dr. Ghattas has opened this private practice to provide a more personalized approach to orthopedic care, focusing on direct surgeon access, tailored treatment plans, and a patient-centric experience. With years of experience in a larger practice, Dr. Ghattas aims to address the growing need for individualized care in the orthopedic field. The practice is now accepting new patients, offering a warm and welcoming environment for those seeking orthopedic services.

news.headline: Campbell's appoints Aaron Gwinner as Chief Digital & Technology Officer effective April 14, 2025, to lead digital transformation.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, the Campbell’s Company revealed the appointment of Aaron Gwinner as the new Senior Vice President and Chief Digital & Technology Officer, starting on April 14, 2025. Gwinner, tasked with spearheading Campbell’s digital transformation strategy, will utilize cutting-edge technologies to boost the company's flexibility, reinforce capabilities, and expedite growth. His duties will encompass overseeing the company’s digital and information strategy, focusing on leveraging innovation to drive success.

news.headline: Stellantis to lay off 900 workers due to Trump's new tariffs. 25% tariff on vehicles and auto parts.
news.summary: Several large companies have initiated layoff announcements following the implementation of President Trump's new tariff policies. Stellantis N.V. (NYSE:STLA), one of the Big Three automakers, revealed plans to temporarily lay off 900 employees and halt production at a facility in Mexico and Canada. The new tariff regime includes a 25% tariff on imported vehicles and auto parts, along with a 10% tariff on all goods entering the U.S. Additionally, reciprocal tariffs aimed at multiple countries were introduced by Trump. This development follows the news of Stellantis' workforce reduction amidst the tariff changes, according to a report by Reuters.

news.headline: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. to host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1 at 8:30 a.m. ET following market close.
news.summary: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) is set to reveal its Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, post-market closure. A conference call is scheduled for the next day at 8:30 a.m. ET to delve into the outcomes. For those interested, the live audio webcast can be accessed at the Events and Presentations section of the Investor page on the Company’s website, investor.mt.com. METTLER TOLEDO (NYSE: MTD) stands as a prominent global entity in this domain.

Trump: Market response to tariffs was expected.
Volkswagen to apply import fee on U.S. car sales amid 25% tariffs by President Trump; a strategic move by automakers.
news.summary: The recent decision made by the company is among the initial and most evident instances of automotive manufacturers resorting to raising prices to address the 25% tariffs implemented by President Trump on car and auto parts imports.

news.headline: Trump: I spoke to automaker executives on Thursday.
Trump: UK is happy about US tariff treatment.
Trump: Government efficiency work will continue after Musk departs.
Trump's tariffs: Imposed on Wed to reset trade ties. Stay informed! #tariffs #trading #news
news.summary: On Wednesday, the president revealed substantial tariffs in a move to recalibrate worldwide trading partnerships. These tariffs encompass a wide range of goods and services, impacting industries both domestically and internationally. The tariffs are set to affect imports and exports worth billions of dollars, with specific details and figures yet to be disclosed. The aim of these tariffs is to address trade imbalances and create a more favorable trading environment for the country. This decision marks a significant shift in trade policy and is expected to have widespread consequences on the global economy.

Trump needs to negotiate on tariffs now to avoid severe economic harm. Time is crucial.
Makin Wellness ranked 71 on Inc.'s 2025 list of fastest-growing companies in Northeast, providing online therapy with top specialists.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Makin Wellness has been recognized by Inc. magazine for its rapid growth as a premier provider of secure online therapy and counseling services. Known for offering a safe and supportive environment, Makin Wellness employs top-rated specialists and a results-driven approach. The company has been named one of the fastest-growing private companies in the industry, solidifying its position as a leader in the field. The accolade comes amidst their dedication to providing quality care to a growing number of clients, showcasing their commitment to excellence and innovation in mental health services.

news.headline: Rocket Lab will release its financial results for Q1 2025 on May 8, 2025, with a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Rocket Lab USA, Inc. declared that it would disclose its financial results for the initial quarter of 2025 after the U.S. markets' closing on Thursday, May 8, 2025. The Company, a prominent figure in launch services and space systems globally, is set to conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). The event will offer a live webcast and a replay option on the Company’s Investor Relations platform.

news.headline: Fortive (NYSE: FTV) declares $0.08 per share quarterly dividend on common stock, payable on June 27, 2025.
news.summary: In Everett, Washington, Fortive Corporation declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share for its common stock, with a par value of $0.01 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on June 27, 2025, to common stockholders recorded as of May 30, 2025. While Fortive plans to continue issuing quarterly dividends, specifics regarding future dividends, such as amounts, record dates, and payment dates, will be determined and announced separately.

news.headline: Wabash schedules Q1 2025 earnings conference call on April 30, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. ET. Access via website or dialing (800) 715-9871 with conference ID 9986205.
news.summary: Wabash (NYSE:WNC) has disclosed today that it will be conducting a webcast for its quarterly earnings conference call to assess the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 30, 2025, commencing at 12:00 p.m. ET. This event, along with a slide presentation, can be accessed through the "Investors" section on Wabash's website, www.onewabash.com, under "Events & Presentations." To join the conference call, participants can dial (800) 715-9871 with the conference ID 9986205. A replay of the call will be made available shortly after.

The earnings report will be unveiled before the market opens on the same day. The conference call is scheduled to commence at 9:00 a.m. Central Time. To join the call, participants are advised to dial in at least 10 minutes early and comply with the instructions provided by the operator. A conference password will be required for access. The US Dial-In number for the call is 1-866-580.

news.headline: ProPetro to discuss Q1 2025 earnings on upcoming call.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the number of coronavirus cases worldwide has reached over 200 million, with the global death toll surpassing 4 million. The United States continues to lead in both cases and deaths, with over 35 million confirmed cases and 600,000 deaths. In efforts to curb the spread of the virus, various countries have been ramping up their vaccination campaigns, administering over 3.5 billion doses globally. Despite vaccination efforts, concerns remain about new variants and the effectiveness of vaccines against them. Governments are urging continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures to protect public health.

news.headline: Imperial Oil to hold 2025 Investor Day on April 17 with top executives presenting at 9am EST via webcast.
news.summary: Imperial Oil Limited, listed on TSE: IMO and NYSE American: IMO, based in Calgary, Alberta, announced that its Chairman and CEO Brad Corson, President John Whelan, and VP of Investor Relations Peter Shaw will lead the 2025 Investor Day on April 17, 2025. The event will commence at 9 a.m. EST and can be accessed via webcast. During the event, the management team will offer insights on the company's operations and strategic direction, followed by a Q&A session.

The financial results will be unveiled on May 7, 2025, after the market closes. Stay tuned for more updates.

news.headline: GrafTech (NYSE:EAF) to announce Q1 2025 earnings on April 25, 2025, with call at 10:00 a.m. (EDT) to discuss results.

The financial results will be disclosed on April 25, 2025, before the market opens and will be accessible on the company's investor relations website.

news.headline: Trump asked about tariffs and market response: Operation over, now it settles in.
CN set new monthly records in March, moving 2.85M metric tonnes of grain from Western Canada & 2.98M metric tonnes nationally.
news.summary: Today, CN (TSX: CNR) (NYSE: CNI) revealed that it has broken new records by transporting over 2.85 million metric tonnes of grain from Western Canada and 2.98 million metric tonnes nationwide in the month of April. This feat was accomplished through collaborative efforts with customers to address challenges posed by severe cold weather conditions in Western Canada earlier in the year, leading to safety-related train length restrictions.

news.headline: Theratechnologies to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 9 at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Montreal-based biopharmaceutical company, Theratechnologies Inc., trading as TH on the TSX and THTX on NASDAQ, revealed plans to disclose its financial outcomes and business progress for the first quarter of 2025 that concluded on February 28. The announcement is scheduled for April 9, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: XRP stabilizes at $2 support level in marketwide sell-off, potential 73% gain as chart pattern suggests breakout. RLUSD integration by Ripple to boost XRP price and liquidity. RLUSD market cap at $244 million indicates growth potential. Analysts eye $3.50+ target for XRP. Symmetrical triangle pattern points to $3.51 with potential 73% gain. Positive sentiment and strong technicals support bullish outlook for XRP. Do your own research before investing.
news.summary: XRP stabilized near $2 support after a market sell-off, showing early signs of a bullish breakout. Ripple’s RLUSD integration into its cross-border payments system could boost XRP price significantly. RLUSD market cap is $244 million with 87% growth in March. Positive sentiment may push XRP to $3.50+. XRP forms a triangle pattern indicating a possible recovery to $3.51, a 73% gain. Analysts predict a bullish outlook for XRP due to adoption and technical factors, with targets ranging from $5 to $18 in the medium to long term. RSI signals a price bottom and a potential upside target of $3.80.

news.headline: OPEC Plus raises oil output after Trump's tariffs, causing prices to drop sharply in the market.
news.summary: The OPEC Plus group, including Saudi Arabia, have intensified efforts to increase oil supply, leading to a significant drop in prices.

news.headline: S&P 500 drops nearly 5% Thursday, worst slump since June 2020, due to trade war fears from higher tariffs.
news.summary: On Thursday, the S&P 500 experienced a significant drop of nearly 5%, marking its sharpest decline since June 2020. This decline was triggered by President Trump's announcement of tariffs that exceeded expectations, sparking renewed economic concerns.

news.headline: 2025 Top 50 Technologies project a $1.8 trillion sector, showing growth opportunities in various industries.
news.summary: New technologies are reshaping industries, presenting significant growth prospects. On April 3, 2025, Frost & Sullivan released its 15th edition of "2025 Top 50 Technologies," showcasing 50 crucial advancements with promising opportunities. This analysis underscores the potential for industries to leverage these innovations for growth and development.

news.headline: ReTo (Nasdaq: RETO) met Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement, receiving a letter on March 28, 2025.

Global cancer research symposium in NYC hosted by The Mark Foundation brought together 150 scientists from 13 states & 7 countries to share breakthroughs.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, The Mark Foundation for Cancer Research brought together over 150 scientists from 13 states and seven countries in New York City for its 2025 Scientific Symposium. This gathering served as a vital platform for the Foundation's grantees to collaborate and exchange ideas.

news.headline: Moneta Ventures raises over $250M fund for U.S. West Coast and Texas startups; focuses on Seed and Series A enterprise software companies.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Moneta Ventures, with headquarters in both Sacramento, CA, and Austin, TX, has successfully secured over $250 million for its third fund. This venture capital firm specializes in supporting Seed and Series A enterprise software companies and follows a unique investment strategy known as "Software++". This approach focuses on identifying software companies with advanced monetization structures and innovative technology solutions. Noteworthy investors in their latest fund round include...

news.headline: Trivest partners with Sentinel Dock & Door Solutions, merging 3 regional providers in Canada for growth, who appoint Travis Allan as CEO.
news.summary: Miami-based private equity firm Trivest Partners has recently established Sentinel Dock & Door Solutions, a prominent network of commercial dock and door service providers in Canada. This new venture combines three top regional service providers into one unified platform, positioning them for further expansion. Alongside this launch, Trivest has appointed Travis Allan as the new Chief Executive Officer of Sentinel.
